# SignaKit Docs

SignaKit is a developer platform for feature flags, A/B testing, and multi-armed bandit experimentation — built for engineering teams who want to decouple deployments from feature releases. The core architectural differentiator is a fetch-once-from-CDN, evaluate-locally model: flag configuration is downloaded once at startup and all subsequent `decide()` calls resolve in-process, with no network round-trip on the hot path and sub-millisecond evaluation latency. SignaKit ships official SDKs for ten platforms — Node.js, Browser, React, React Native, Python, Go, PHP, Laravel, Java, and Flutter — so teams can use one consistent experimentation system across every layer of their stack. It is designed for engineering teams shipping software at any scale who need precise targeting, safe gradual rollouts, and statistically rigorous experiments without adding latency to their critical paths.

## SignaKit Flags

The Flags section covers everything needed to integrate SignaKit feature flags into your application: a quickstart guide, full SDK references for all ten supported platforms, core concepts (targeting, A/B testing, multi-armed bandits, audiences, environments), framework-specific integration guides, and a changelog.

### Getting Started
- [Quickstart](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/quickstart)

### SDKs
- [Node.js SDK (@signakit/flags-node)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/node)
- [Browser SDK (@signakit/flags-browser)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/browser)
- [React SDK (@signakit/flags-react)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/react)
- [React Native SDK (@signakit/flags-react-native)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/react-native)
- [Flutter SDK (signakit_flags)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/flutter)
- [Python SDK (signakit-flags)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/python)
- [Go SDK (flags-golang)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/go)
- [Java SDK (flags-java)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/java)
- [PHP SDK (signakit/flags-php)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/php)
- [Laravel SDK (signakit/flags-laravel)](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/sdks/laravel)

- [Feature Flags](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/concepts/feature-flags)

- [Multi-Armed Bandit](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/concepts/multi-armed-bandit)
- [Audiences](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/concepts/audiences)

- [Express](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/guides/express)
- [Fastify](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/guides/fastify)
- [NestJS](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/guides/nestjs)
- [React SPA](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/guides/react-spa)
- [React Native / Expo](https://docs.signakit.com/docs/flags/guides/react-native-expo)

## SignaKit Events

SignaKit Events (coming soon) — track custom user actions as experiment conversion metrics.
